scaler_status: No StandardScaler, RobustScaler, normalization transform, or imputer is used by either selected artifact unless a future artifact inspection proves otherwise.
input_dtype: float32 for exported model compatibility; original training matrix was converted to numpy float32 in run_loocv_models.
nan_handling: No imputation found. Input rows must provide finite numeric values for all 22 features; NaN handling should be a caller-side validation error.

model_a.preprocessing: direct raw feature values; each bagged estimator selects a feature subset internally

model_b.preprocessing: direct raw feature values; decision tree thresholds are in raw feature units
